states.name: Victoria
states.title: The Crowned Étoile
states.description:
Victoria was born as the eldest daughter of the long-standing Royal House of Wellmund.
Raised from childhood to one day succeed her father, the king, she received a thorough royal education. Combined with her exceptional talent, she has mastered horsemanship, etiquette, diplomacy, and politics.

states.name: Victoria
states.title: The Crowned Étoile
states.description:
She also joined the Royal Ballet Troupe, one of Wellmund's proudest cultural institutions. There, she quickly blossomed as a skilled dancer and rose to the prestigious position of étoile—the very face of the entire troupe.
But when her father, the king, fell gravely ill and could no longer carry out his duties, Victoria had to inherit the throne. From that day on, she found herself consumed by the endless demands of being a queen.

states.name: Victoria
states.title: The Crowned Étoile
states.description: Before long, her ballet training had to fall by the wayside. A perfectionist to her core, Victoria could not tolerate performing at anything less than her best, and resolved to leave behind the ballet she loved rather than drag down the rest of the troupe. But through the events of the recent incident, she came to understand the strength it takes to rely on others. And with the help of this strength, she hopes that once she has truly grown into her role as queen...she might one day return to the stage again.
